case_title: ABTIHAJ WALLACE ET AL VS. TOM CRENSHAW ET AL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-30-2015 - DEFENDANT'S CLAIM CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO APR-06-2016 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFFS. DEFENDANTS AND CROSS-COMPLAINANTS TOM CRENSHAW AND MAXINE MOORE APPEARED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF WALLACE, ABTIHAJ SHAW, KELLY AS TO DEFENDANT CRENSHAW, TOM
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-13-2015, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MOORE, MAXINE

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WALLACE, ABTIHAJ ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY DEFENDANT CRENSHAW, TOM MOORE, MAXINE AS TO PLAINTIFF WALLACE, ABTIHAJ

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-06-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUN-08-2016 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY CROSS-COMPLAINANTS TOM CRENSHAW AND MAXINE MOORE ONLY. THE PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM WAS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE 12-30-15. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,000.00 FILED BY WALLACE, ABTIHAJ SHAW, KELLY AS TO DEFENDANT CRENSHAW, TOM MOORE, MAXINE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-30-2015 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF WALLACE, ABTIHAJ SHAW, KELLY AS TO DEFENDANT MOORE, MAXINE
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY CRENSHAW, TOM MOORE, MAXINE AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT WALLACE, ABTIHAJ SHAW, KELLY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-30-2015 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE PLAINTIFF'S ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFFS. DEFENDANTS AND CROSS-COMPLAINANTS TOM CRENSHAW AND MAXINE MOORE APPEARED. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT WALLACE, ABTIHAJ SHAW, KELLY

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT TOM CRENSHAW. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON BOTH CROSS--DEFENDANTS. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. THE PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM WAS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE 12-30-15. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
